name: SectionHeader
purpose: Provides a reusable recipe-level section heading for grouped prototype content and polished screen composition.
whenToUse: Use when a screen has repeated grouped sections that should share the same hierarchy and spacing.
Use for recipe-driven prototypes before deciding whether a lower-level shared component is needed.
whenNotToUse: Do not use as a replacement for a page-level header.
Do not wrap every card title with SectionHeader when a plain CardTitle is enough.
accessibilityRequirements: If trailing content is interactive, ensure it has its own accessibility labels.
